trans-unit.source: The package has already been registered
trans-unit.note: ESP="El bulto ya ha sido registrado"

trans-unit.source: Product %1 with Quantity %2 has no assigned Quality

trans-unit.source: The Sales Return %1 is not found

trans-unit.source: There are no outstanding quantities. Do you want to completely archived the package?
trans-unit.note: ESP="No existen cantidades pendientes. Desea archivar completamente el bulto?"
Page RMAs Package Card - NamedType Confirm01

trans-unit.source: It is not permitted to close packages with lines without a sales return number
trans-unit.note: ESP="No se permite cerrar bultos con lineas sin devolución"
Page RMAs Package Card - NamedType Error01

trans-unit.source: It is not permitted to posted packages with lines without a sales return number
trans-unit.note: ESP="No se permite registrar bultos con lineas sin devolución"
Page RMAs Package Card - NamedType Error02

trans-unit.source: The regularization without refund must include the reason for the incident
trans-unit.note: ESP="La regularización sin devolución deberá incluir el motivo de la incidencia"
Page RMAs Package Card - NamedType Error03

trans-unit.source: It is not permitted to close packages with lines without quantity.
trans-unit.note: ESP="No se permite cerrar bultos con lineas sin cantidad."
Page RMAs Package Card - NamedType Error04

Page RMAs Return Item Faxbox - Control QtyInReturnOrders - Property Caption
ESP="Operarios Devoluciones"
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Property Caption
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the base unit used to measure the resource, such as hour, piece, or kilometer.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Base Unit of Measure - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Blocked - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the date of the most recent change of information in the Resource Card window.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Last Date Modified - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies a description of the resource.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies information in addition to the description.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Name 2 - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether to limit access to data for the data subject during daily operations. This is useful, for example, when protecting data from changes while it is under privacy review.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Privacy Blocked - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the resource group that this resource is assigned to.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Resource Group No. - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Search Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the approver of the time sheet.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Time Sheet Approver User ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the owner of the time sheet.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Time Sheet Owner User ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the resource is a person or a machine.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Type - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if a resource uses a time sheet to record time allocated to various tasks.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Control Use Time Sheet - Property ToolTip
ESP="Precios"
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action &Prices - Property Caption
ESP="Precios Compra"
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action PurchPriceLists - Property Caption
ESP="Precios Venta"
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action SalesPriceLists - Property Caption
ESP="Recurso"
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action &Resource - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View or add comments for the record.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action Co&mments - Property ToolTip
ESP="Comentarios"
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action Co&mments - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View statistical information, such as the value of posted entries, for the record.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action Statistics - Property ToolTip
ESP="Estadísticas"
Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action Statistics - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: View or edit the units of measure that are set up for the resource.
trans-unit.note: Page RMAs Return Resource Card - Action Units of Measure - Property ToolTip
